title: Chemica
description: Create & The Factory Must Grow addon implementing real-world chemistry and industrial processes
body:
## Installation Requirements Chemica runs on NeoForge and requires you install [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) for 1.20.1 or [NeoForge]([https://modrinth.com/mod/jei](https://neoforged.net/)) for 1.21.1 before adding Chemica to your mods folder.
Additionally, you will need to install [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) for Chemica to work.

[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) and [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) are also recommended. ## About Chemica is an addon for Create: The Factory Must Grow that aims to implement real-world chemistry and industrial processes in a fun and meaningful way. It brings an array of new materials, items, fluids, gases and recipe trees. Some of Chemica's current content includes: - Creation of new types of plastic like PVC and Epoxy Resin - Production and use of multiple types of acid - Carbon Fiber processing tree - Many new ores, metals, fluids & fuels - Chemical production from various materials
... and much more planned for the future! ## Development This project is still early in development and content is subject to change in future releases. If you have any ideas or suggestions, or would like to report a bug you can do so [here](https://discord.gg/mN3wrPxs3x), in the Chemica discord. Once built up, the project will be open source and will (hopefully) have a full wiki. ### Developers cosmads ### Contributors PouffyDev
